_meta.data_sources_policy: LPT figures are verified against the official lpt.com flyer (valid until 4/30/26) provided by Joe. Competitor figures may use publicly documented sources; cite source_url per brokerage. Unknown numeric fields must be null (renders as '—' in UI). Never fabricate.
_meta.per_txn_fee_model_note: The $195 LPT per-txn fee is a brokerage fee charged on every transaction, regardless of whether the agent passes it through to the client at closing. For cost-comparison purposes against other brokerages, it must be counted as a real per-transaction brokerage cost. The pass-through mechanic is a cash-flow convenience between agent and client (default behavior), but does not change the fact that the brokerage charges $195 per deal. Calc: always include 195 × txns in the agent cost total.
_meta.note_to_claude_code: This file is the single source of truth. LPT entry is fully verified. Populate remaining brokerages using publicly documented sources. Each published entry must have data_asof, source_url, and status='published'. Draft entries stay hidden from the UI.

brokerages.name: LPT Realty
brokerages.agent_count_note: 2025 RealTrends Top 10 Ranked Brokerage; 2025 Deloitte Fast 500 #2 in USA; 2026 Training Magazine MVP Award

plans.annual_fee_note: Withheld from first deal each year. Covers technology and E&O.
plans.notes: 80/20 split until $15K cap, then 100% for rest of anniversary year. $195 per-txn fee is a brokerage fee on every transaction. Default mechanic: passed through to client at closing. Agent can choose to absorb it. Eligible for full HybridShare revenue share.

plans.annual_fee_note: Withheld from first deal each year. Covers technology and E&O.
plans.notes: $500/txn until $5K cap (10 transactions). $195 per-txn brokerage fee applies to every transaction; default mechanic is pass-through to client. Business Builders CAN recruit and build a downline, but HybridShare earnings only activate after upgrading to Brokerage Partner. Downline built as BB carries over on upgrade.

revshare.mechanics_explained: Each agent's capped company dollar funds the HybridShare Pool for their transactions. BP agents cap at $15K (so $7,500 goes to the pool over the year). BB agents cap at $5K (so $2,500 goes to the pool over the year). An upline sponsor's annual HybridShare earnings from a given downline agent = (downline's pool contribution) × (sponsor's tier percentage). Max per-txn figures in the tier_breakdown show per-txn earnings from that downline's activity.
revshare.tier_breakdown_note: The BP and BB columns show max annual HybridShare earnings for an upline sponsor, based on which plan the downline agent is on. A BP-plan downline who caps contributes more to the pool, so sponsors earn more from BP downline than from BB downline.

earner_eligibility.brokerage_partner: Earns HybridShare per the tier schedule, subject to restrictions below.
earner_eligibility.business_builder: CAN recruit and build a sponsored downline while on the BB plan. However, HybridShare earnings do NOT activate until the BB agent upgrades to Brokerage Partner. The downline tree carries over on upgrade - recruiting activity is not lost. Strategy: agents can stay on BB to minimize brokerage costs while they build their tree, then flip to BP when HybridShare earning potential outweighs the incremental cost.

restrictions: Must complete one full Core Transaction before HybridShare earnings apply
HybridShare earnings apply to cap first (not cash)
No HybridShare earnings during first 90 days at LPT
Prohibited from offering any 'thing of value' to be named a sponsor
BB plan: can build downline, but earnings activate only upon BP upgrade
revshare.dual_sponsorship_note: For Dual Sponsorship all dollars are allocated 45% to each sponsor and their respective upline.
revshare.notes: 7-tier structure. 50% of company dollar allocated to the HybridShare Pool per transaction.

equity.stock_type: RSU awards via Performance Awards program
equity.vesting_note: Three year vesting on each RSU award. Agents must remain Active to maintain multipliers, earn, and vest awards.

sponsorship_award_per_direct_sponsored.trigger: Direct sponsored agent's first Core Transaction (one-time)

conditions: All Agents have a multiplier determined by join date, comp plan, and benefits plan.
Black Badge requires Brokerage Partner plan for the entire period.
Gold and Black Badge require leadership and community engagement (waived until full launch of lptConnect 2.0).
Black Badge Core Transaction requirements may be adjusted annually to represent approximately the top 1% of eligible agents.
For Sponsorship Performance Awards, sponsored agent must remain Active during your vesting period.
Each agent receives 45% credit for the dual sponsored agent.
Baseline Shares Awarded will change from time to time.
equity.notes: Non-publicly traded. Liquidity event depends on future IPO, acquisition, or internal buyback.

included_tools: Listing Power Tools X (proprietary marketing system)
Dotloop or Skyslope (contract management, document storage, e-sign, lptConnect integration)
Lofty, Follow Up Boss, or KV Core (CRM and lead management)
technology.optional_package: Combination of free software and optional upgrades
technology.crm_note: Agent chooses from Lofty, Follow Up Boss, or KV Core as included CRM.
technology.tpl_advantage: TPL Collective agents receive Mission Control CRM, SOPs, AI tools, training, and community inside LPT - on top of the standard LPT tech stack.

notable_programs: Motivational Mondays with CEO Robert Palmer (Mondays 11:00 AM EST on Zoom)

brokerages.tpl_callout: LPT Realty is the brokerage. TPL Collective is the team/community leverage layer operating inside LPT. The numbers above are LPT's. TPL adds Mission Control CRM, SOPs, AI tools, training infrastructure, and a structured residual community on top.

plans.notes: 80/20 split capped at $16K. $85/mo cloud fee. $85/deal pre-cap ($25 broker review + $60 risk mgmt). Post-cap: $250/deal for up to 20 txns, then $75 sponsor fee. $149 startup fee not included.

tiers: ICON Agent: $16K cap rebated as stock
Agent Equity Program: purchase at 10% discount
Sustainable Equity Plan: grants at milestones

plans.notes: 85/15 capped at $12K, no monthly fee. $265/deal pre-cap ($225 tx + $40 E&O). Post-cap: $200/deal. $750 annual fee billed across first 3 closings.
